title: Mindfulness Enters the Workplace
subtitle: 冥想如何从禅修室走进企业办公室

paragraphs.en: Mindfulness practices have migrated from meditation retreats to corporate boardrooms with remarkable speed. Companies including Google, Apple, and Goldman Sachs now offer meditation programs to employees. Proponents argue that mindfulness reduces stress, enhances focus, and ultimately improves organizational performance.
paragraphs.zh: 正念练习以惊人的速度从冥想静修中心迁移到企业董事会。包括谷歌、苹果和高盛在内的公司现在为员工提供冥想课程。支持者认为正念可以减轻压力、增强专注力，并最终提高组织绩效。

paragraphs.en: Scientific research supports some workplace mindfulness benefits. Studies demonstrate reduced anxiety and improved emotional regulation among regular practitioners. Brief meditation sessions can refresh mental clarity, potentially boosting productivity during demanding workdays.
paragraphs.zh: 科学研究支持一些职场正念的益处。研究表明，经常练习的人焦虑减少，情绪调节能力提高。简短的冥想可以恢复精神清晰度，可能在繁忙的工作日中提高生产力。

paragraphs.en: Critics caution against using mindfulness as a corporate productivity tool. Some argue that employers use meditation programs to help workers tolerate stressful conditions rather than addressing underlying problems. The commercialization of contemplative practices raises questions about authenticity and appropriation.
paragraphs.zh: 批评者警告不要将正念作为企业生产力工具。一些人认为，雇主利用冥想课程帮助员工忍受压力环境，而不是解决根本问题。冥想实践的商业化引发了关于真实性和文化挪用的问题。

paragraphs.en: The roots of mindfulness in Buddhist tradition often disappear in corporate contexts. Practices designed for spiritual liberation become techniques for enhanced efficiency. Some teachers worry that separating meditation from its ethical foundations fundamentally distorts its purpose.
paragraphs.zh: 正念在佛教传统中的根源在企业环境中往往消失不见。为精神解脱而设计的修行变成了提高效率的技巧。一些导师担心，将冥想与其伦理基础分离从根本上扭曲了它的目的。

paragraphs.en: Whether workplace mindfulness represents genuine wellness support or sophisticated stress management remains debatable. Employees benefit from any tools that improve mental health, regardless of corporate motives. The challenge lies in implementing mindfulness authentically while acknowledging its limitations as a solution to systemic workplace issues.
paragraphs.zh: 职场正念究竟代表着真正的健康支持还是精密的压力管理仍有争议。无论企业动机如何，员工都会从任何改善心理健康的工具中受益。挑战在于真实地实施正念，同时承认它作为系统性职场问题解决方案的局限性。
